allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('deps:', list\(d.get\('dependencies',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.loads\(json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\)[0]['text']\); assets=[a['name'] for a in data.get\('assets',[]\)]; print\('\\n'.join\([a for a in assets if 'cuda' in a.lower\(\) or 'win' in a.lower\(\)]\)\)")
